mapper.sql: ID, CustomerNo, SID, AddCode, SAddress, CstmName, DlvAddress, ContactPsn, TeleNo, PostCode, TransFee, Dlvtype, Upddate, CreateDate, StateCode, OptUser, ModifyExpressReason, AddressType, CreateUser, IsDefault, IsCommonUse, IsConfirm, Province, City, Area, Status, HashCode, IntenNO, ExpDlvType, NoDlvType, HeavyUpstair, ValiDate, Etimes
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._GZ_custdlvdata
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._GZ_custdlvdata (ID, CustomerNo, SID, AddCode, SAddress, CstmName, DlvAddress, ContactPsn, TeleNo, PostCode, TransFee, Dlvtype, Upddate, CreateDate, StateCode, OptUser, ModifyExpressReason, AddressType, CreateUser, IsDefault, IsCommonUse, IsConfirm, Province, City, Area, Status, HashCode, IntenNO, ExpDlvType, NoDlvType, HeavyUpstair, ValiDate, Etimes ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{cstmname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{transfee,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifyexpressreason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{addresstype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isdefault,jdbcType=BIT}, #{iscommonuse,jdbcType=BIT}, #{isconfirm,jdbcType=BIT}, #{province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{area,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{hashcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{intenno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expdlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{nodlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{heavyupstair,jdbcType=BIT}, #{validate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{etimes,jdbcType=SMALLINT} )

mapper.update:
update dbo._GZ_custdlvdata
ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SID = #{record.sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AddCode = #{record.addcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SAddress = #{record.saddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
CstmName = #{record.cstmname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvAddress = #{record.dlvaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TeleNo = #{record.teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR},
Dlvtype = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR},
Upddate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CreateDate = #{record.createdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptUser = #{record.optuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModifyExpressReason = #{record.modifyexpressreason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AddressType = #{record.addresstype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CreateUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IsDefault = #{record.isdefault,jdbcType=BIT},
IsCommonUse = #{record.iscommonuse,jdbcType=BIT},
IsConfirm = #{record.isconfirm,jdbcType=BIT},
Province = #{record.province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
City = #{record.city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Area = #{record.area,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
HashCode = #{record.hashcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IntenNO = #{record.intenno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ExpDlvType = #{record.expdlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
NoDlvType = #{record.nodlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
HeavyUpstair = #{record.heavyupstair,jdbcType=BIT},
ValiDate = #{record.validate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Etimes = #{record.etimes,jdbcType=SMALLINT},

update dbo._GZ_custdlvdata set ID = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SID = #{record.sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AddCode = #{record.addcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SAddress = #{record.saddress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, CstmName = #{record.cstmname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DlvAddress = #{record.dlvaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ContactPsn = #{record.contactpsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TeleNo = #{record.teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, TransFee = #{record.transfee,jdbcType=CHAR}, Dlvtype = #{record.dlvtype,jdbcType=CHAR}, Upddate = #{record.upddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CreateDate = #{record.createdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, StateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OptUser = #{record.optuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ModifyExpressReason = #{record.modifyexpressreason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AddressType = #{record.addresstype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CreateUser = #{record.createuser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IsDefault = #{record.isdefault,jdbcType=BIT}, IsCommonUse = #{record.iscommonuse,jdbcType=BIT}, IsConfirm = #{record.isconfirm,jdbcType=BIT}, Province = #{record.province,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, City = #{record.city,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Area = #{record.area,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Status = #{record.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, HashCode = #{record.hashcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IntenNO = #{record.intenno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ExpDlvType = #{record.expdlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, NoDlvType = #{record.nodlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, HeavyUpstair = #{record.heavyupstair,jdbcType=BIT}, ValiDate = #{record.validate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Etimes = #{record.etimes,jdbcType=SMALLINT}
